body_excerpt: In ProtocolNetSimFileInfoAdapter() of protocolnetadapter.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure with baseband firmware compromise required. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In ProtocolNetSimFileInfoAdapter() of protocolnetadapter.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure with baseband firmwa
